definition: To bring something to a person or place
hint: 郵便屋さんが手紙を届けるイメージだよ！

definition: To keep someone or something safe from danger
hint: ヒーローが街を守るイメージ！

definition: More than two but not very many
hint: 1個でも2個でもない、数個ってこと！

definition: Feeling very happy and full of energy about something
hint: クリスマスの朝のワクワクした気持ち！

definition: To complete something or bring it to an end
hint: マラソンのゴールのイメージ！

definition: To not be able to find something
hint: 消しゴムがどこかに行っちゃった！

definition: Not in the place where you expect it to be
hint: 見つからない、いなくなったということ！

definition: To start to be something
hint: 大きくなったら何になる？

definition: Making you laugh or smile
hint: お笑い芸人はこれが得意！

definition: To decide what you are going to do and how to do it
hint: 旅行に行く前にやることだよ！

definition: To go up something like a mountain or a tree
hint: 山のてっぺんを目指す！

definition: Having a lot of people in one place
hint: お祭りの時の電車の中みたい！

definition: To get something that someone gives or sends to you
hint: お誕生日にプレゼントをもらう！

definition: Liked or enjoyed by many people
hint: みんなに大人気ってこと！

definition: Quickly and without warning
hint: びっくりするくらい急に！

definition: To ask someone to come to a party or event
hint: パーティーの招待状を送るよ！

definition: The number of people living in a place
hint: この街に住んでいる人は全部で何人？

definition: To stop a machine or light from working
hint: 寝る前に電気を消すよ！

definition: To learn about a subject by reading or practicing
hint: テストの前にやること！

definition: To choose what to do after thinking about it
hint: どっちにしようかな〜って考えた後にすること！

definition: To go somewhere and collect someone, usually by car
hint: お母さんが駅まで車で来てくれる！

definition: Extremely good; making you feel very happy
hint: 最高！すばらしい！って感じ！

definition: To use money to buy things or use time doing something
hint: お小遣いを使う、時間をかけるということ！

definition: A lower price than the usual one
hint: セールで安くなること！

definition: To try to find something or someone
hint: 落とし物を探すときにすること！

definition: Feeling unhappy because you think something bad might happen
hint: テストの結果が気になって不安…

definition: After a long time or after many difficulties
hint: やっと！ついに！

definition: To give something to someone for a short time
hint: 友達にノートを貸してあげる！

definition: Finding something new or learning something for the first time
hint: コロンブスがアメリカ大陸を見つけたみたいに！

definition: To become a member of a group or to do an activity with others
hint: サッカー部に入る！

definition: To look after someone or something
hint: ペットのお世話をするよ！

definition: Extremely good or attractive
hint: すごい！最高！って叫びたくなる！

definition: To become hard and solid because of very cold temperature
hint: 冬になると水が氷になるよ！

definition: To feel happy and excited about something that is going to happen
hint: 遠足が楽しみ！ってとき！

definition: To hold something and take it from one place to another
hint: 重い荷物を持って歩く！

definition: To tell someone that you will definitely do something
hint: 指切りげんまん！

definition: Something bad that happens by chance, causing damage or injury
hint: 車がぶつかっちゃった…

definition: Without difficulty or effort
hint: かんたんに、らくらく！

definition: To help someone learn something by giving them information
hint: 学校の先生がやること！

definition: Things that you throw away because you do not want them
hint: 毎朝ゴミ箱に入れるもの！

definition: Using the phone to talk to someone
hint: スマホで友達と話してるよ！

definition: To learn or discover a fact or piece of information
hint: 答えがわかった！見つけた！

definition: To write information in the blank spaces on a form
hint: 申し込み用紙に名前を書く！

definition: Wanting to know more about something
hint: もっと知りたい！ってワクワクする気持ち！

definition: To get things from different places and bring them together
hint: 切手やカードを集めるのが好き！

definition: Having a large distance from one side to the other
hint: 大きな川の横幅のイメージ！

definition: In the place of something or someone else
hint: ケーキの代わりにアイスを食べよう！

definition: To make a drawing or plan of something that will be made
hint: お洋服や建物をかっこよく作る計画！

definition: To make an effort to do something
hint: やってみよう！チャレンジ！

definition: Not open for business or visitors
hint: お店のドアに「CLOSED」って書いてある！

definition: Doing things quickly because you do not have much time
hint: 遅刻しそうで走ってる！

definition: In the beginning, before other things happened
hint: 最初は怖かったけど、今は平気！

definition: To be able to do something well
hint: サッカーが上手！って褒められる！

definition: To do something wrong or incorrect
hint: テストで計算を間違えちゃった！

definition: Before now or before a particular time
hint: もう終わったよ！って時に使う！

definition: To be involved in an activity or event with other people
hint: マラソン大会に参加する！

definition: To move through the air using wings
hint: 鳥が空を飛んでいる！

definition: To give information to someone by speaking
hint: 秘密を友達に教える！

definition: Making you feel very surprised and upset
hint: びっくり！信じられない！

definition: For a short period of time
hint: ちょっとの間、しばらく！

definition: The most important city of a country, where the government is
hint: 日本なら東京、アメリカならワシントンD.C.！

definition: To go from one side of something to the other
hint: 横断歩道を渡る！

definition: To take something from someone and give it back later
hint: 図書館で本を借りる！

definition: Knowledge or skill that you get from doing something
hint: いろんなことをやって身につくもの！

definition: To use something carelessly without a good purpose
hint: 食べ物を残したらもったいない！

definition: To be known by many people because of something special
hint: 富士山は世界的に有名！

definition: To check that something is true or has been done
hint: 忘れ物がないかチェック！

definition: To have no more of something left to sell
hint: 人気商品が全部売り切れ！

definition: Big in size or amount
hint: ピザのLサイズ！

definition: Happening quickly and without warning
hint: 急にドアが開いた！

definition: To have the same opinion as someone else
hint: 「うん、そうだね！」って言うこと！

definition: Having nothing inside
hint: 冷蔵庫に何も入ってない！

definition: Giving a lot of attention to what you are doing
hint: ていねいに、慎重に！

definition: To cover something by putting paper or cloth around it
hint: プレゼントをきれいな紙で包む！

definition: Alone, without help from anyone
hint: 自分ひとりの力で！

definition: At any time; it does not matter when
hint: いつでもどうぞ！

definition: Up until now (used in negative sentences and questions)
hint: まだ宿題やってないの？

definition: To go to a place or person for a short time
hint: おじいちゃんの家に遊びに行く！

definition: To change something slightly so that it works better or fits better
hint: 新しい環境に慣れる！

definition: A person who flies an airplane
hint: 飛行機を操縦する人！
